sql_array: CREATE TABLE test.hits (EventTime DateTime, value Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY EventTime;
INSERT INTO test.hits (EventTime, value) VALUES (now(), 300000), (now() - interval 1 hour, 150000), (now() - interval 2 hours, 600000);
SELECT toHour(EventTime) AS h, count() AS c, bar(c, 0, 600000, 20) AS bar FROM test.hits GROUP BY h ORDER BY h ASC;
UPDATE test.hits SET value = value + 100000 WHERE EventTime < now() - interval 1 hour;
SELECT bar(avg(value), 0, 600000, 20) AS avg_bar FROM test.hits;
